name: Here the expression 'they who disbelieve' signifies either those who refused to obey
introduction:
God and held their property to be clearer than God's good pleasure, or those who did not
believe in the Day of which they had been warned, or those who cherished the false i11usion
that in the Hereafter they would somehow be able to secure their salvation and that their
association with men devoted to God would stand them in good stead for they would
intercede with God on their behalf.
